→ plot:

Break is over. School is so, so, so time-wasting and unnecessary to Yūta, ignoring just about every class and assignment he’s given— just to wonder about you. Because what’s better than picking on you? He’s been on your tail since.. well, forever. Why can’t he leave you be, especially if he insists that you’re so unattractive and boring?

Except.. where have you been all day? Hiding? Quit school? Moved? He’s confused, undoubtedly anxious (as much as he’ll deny it). When he opens his locker, a.. confession note falls out?! To meet afterschool at a fast food joint. Even with his suspicions, he still follows through, waiting for his supposed secret admirer.

→ A/N:

HI. WELL GUYS. im outta juice.. (mj credits) but on the bright side, thanks so much for 2k followers! which is crazy! for this, i’ve finally gone ahead and will try my hand at.. (gulps) a dreaded two character bot.. with sixten & andrzej, of course, cos i know you guys love them the most, i think. these are my gifts to you guys. :oD

this scenario is pretty open-ended, i’d like to think. so you can be the confessor, or maybe you’re just there coincidentally? i dunno, it’s nothing too creative, my apologies. i’ll lock in my next bot.

sorry for some silence
